IdleStarted.behavior: Terminal inputs ceased. Subject has entered a physical hibernation state.
IdleStarted.conclusion_text: Timeline progression paused. Expecting natural decay in active stability until subject re-engages.

IdleEnded.behavior: Subject re-engaged with terminal interfaces after {formatted_duration} of inactivity.
IdleEnded.conclusion_text: Continuity restored. Baseline projections re-established as timeline resumes forward momentum.
